# uptimekuma_notification_promosms (Resource)

PromoSMS notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_promosms" "example" {
  name           = "PromoSMS Notification"
  is_active      = true
  login          = "your_promosms_login"
  password       = "your_promosms_password"
  phone_number   = "+48501234567"
  sender_name    = "YourCompany"
  sms_type       = "1"
  allow_long_sms = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `login` (String, Sensitive) PromoSMS login/username for authentication
- `name` (String) Notification name
- `password` (String, Sensitive) PromoSMS password for authentication
- `phone_number` (String) Recipient phone number for SMS messages

### Optional

- `allow_long_sms` (Boolean) Allow long SMS messages (up to 639 characters instead of 159)
- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `sender_name` (String) Sender name/ID displayed in the SMS
- `sms_type` (String) SMS type identifier

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
